---
name: Feature Request / طلب ميزة
about: Suggest a new feature for ARKSpace
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary / ملخص الميزة

A clear and concise description of the feature.

## Problem / المشكلة

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a frustration?

## Proposed Solution / الحل المقترح

Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered / البدائل المدروسة

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Target Module / الوحدة المستهدفة

- [ ] ARKSpace Core
- [ ] ARKSpace Spaces
- [ ] ARKSpace Memberships
- [ ] ARKSpace CRM
- [ ] ARKSpace Contracts
- [ ] ARKSpace Training
- [ ] ARKSpace Integrations
- [ ] ARKSpace Documentation
- [ ] ARKSpace Design
- [ ] Other: ___

## User Roles Affected / الأدوار المتأثرة

- [ ] ARKSpace Admin
- [ ] ARKSpace Manager
- [ ] ARKSpace Sales
- [ ] ARKSpace Operations
- [ ] ARKSpace Front Desk
- [ ] ARKSpace Member
- [ ] Guest / Portal User

## Bilingual Requirements / متطلبات ثنائية اللغة

- [ ] UI text needs Arabic translation
- [ ] DocType fields need Arabic labels
- [ ] Portal content needs Arabic version
- [ ] Email templates need Arabic version

## Additional Context / سياق إضافي

Add any mockups, screenshots, or additional context.
